## Log

[2026-05-19 14:50] Claude - DONE: Bootstrap — created AI_CONTEXT.md, memory.json, ai-activity-log.md, copilot-instructions.md. Reviewed ABLETON_INTERACTION.md from Automated DJ Mixes. Scoped project: stem folder → Ableton project with Sam's layout. Waiting for reference ALS files.
[2026-05-19] Claude - DONE: Built V1 pipeline — stem_classifier.py, als_patcher.py, project_builder.py. Test build with Ak1ra stems passed. User flagged 2 bugs: clip duration too long (2x silence), tempo stuck at 120.
[2026-05-19] Claude - STARTED: Fixing clip duration bug (Loop values used beats instead of seconds) and verifying tempo fix.
[2026-05-19] Claude - DONE: Fixed clip duration — LoopEnd/OutMarker/HiddenLoopEnd now use duration_sec (source time) instead of duration_beats. Verified generated values match real Ak1ra clips exactly. Tempo was already correct in XML (122). Rebuilt test project. Changed: Source/als_patcher.py
[2026-05-19] Claude - DONE: Fixed tempo display — the FloatEvent in tempo automation envelope was still at 120, overriding Manual Value. Now patches both. Changed: Source/als_patcher.py
[2026-05-19] Claude - DONE: Added bar 33 start (CLIP_START_BEATS=128) and phrase-level silence detection. find_audio_regions() scans WAVs with -50dB RMS threshold, 10s minimum gap, splits stems into sections. Multi-clip support — 112 clips from 36 tracks. Studied Sam's GroupTrack changes (Ref group, muted, ext routing). Changed: Source/als_patcher.py, Source/project_builder.py
[2026-05-19] Claude - DONE: Fixed adaptive silence threshold (peak_rms - 40dB per stem) and integrated GroupTrack for ref stems. Ref group: muted, external output, collapsed, all 18 ref tracks linked. Vocal/FX stems no longer chopped. Changed: Source/als_patcher.py
[2026-05-19] Claude - DONE: Three ref group fixes — (1) LaneHeight=17 on working tracks + GroupTrack, Session Time stays at 68, (2) GroupTrack routing changed from AudioOut/External/S0 to AudioOut/Main for solo audio, (3) GroupTrack LaneHeight from 51 to 17. Both test projects rebuilt. Changed: Source/als_patcher.py
[2026-05-19] Claude - DONE: Set TrackUnfolded=true on working tracks (was false in template) so they open with inline waveforms visible in arrangement view at LaneHeight=17. Ref GroupTrack stays Unfolded=false (collapsed). Matches picture 2 of Sam's desired layout. Changed: Source/als_patcher.py
[2026-05-19] Claude - DONE: Fixed ref group not collapsing — template had IsContentSelectedInDocument=true on every track. With every ref child marked selected, Ableton kept the group expanded to show the selection. Now clear_all_selections() sets all to false at end of patch_project. Both projects rebuilt. Changed: Source/als_patcher.py
[2026-05-19] Claude - DONE: Rewrote insert_group_track() to match Ableton 12.4's canonical GroupTrack structure (extracted by diffing Sam's manually-saved collapsed group). Old template had AudioSequencer wrapper inside FreezeSequencer (old format), missing Mixer/PanMode, SoloSink, CrossFadeState, ViewStateSessionTrackWidth, and FreezeSequencer modulation targets. Malformed structure caused Ableton to ignore TrackUnfolded=false and open the group expanded. Now generated from a single _GROUP_TRACK_TEMPLATE string with 22 unique IDs allocated. Both projects rebuilt. Changed: Source/als_patcher.py
[2026-05-19] Claude - PARTIAL: Ref group still opens expanded in Ableton 12.4 despite matching canonical structure exactly. Top-level GroupTrack and child track properties identical to Sam's collapsed Vox group. Cause unknown — possibly Ableton-version quirk. Low priority per Sam. To revisit tomorrow.
[2026-05-19] Claude - DONE: Built BPM detector (detect_bpm.py prototype) — finds kick onsets via windowed peak detection, computes median interval, normalises to 90-180 dance range. Tested on three real tracks: Coldabank ✓ (134 matched filename), Fire In Your Eyes (130, no filename hint), Lucozade (125, filename said 128 — slight 10ms window resolution gap). Successfully built three new test projects (Jones - Fire In Your Eyes, Coldabank - Never Say Sorry, Pressure - Lucozade). Detector not yet integrated into project_builder pipeline.
[2026-05-19] Claude - TODO_NEXT: Two pending fixes for tomorrow — (1) Clip Name in Ableton uses simplified display_name ("DR Kick") instead of original filename. Audio files on disk are correct (original names preserved), but in-Ableton clip label should match the source filename. Fix: change insert_clip_into_track in Source/als_patcher.py to use original filename for clip Name. (2) Add classifier patterns for BVs, Tops, Fills, CABASA, Ref Bounce, DRM_* (encountered in Coldabank/Lucozade/Fire In Your Eyes builds).
[2026-06-25] Claude - STARTED: Building pure-stdlib BPM detector (Source/bpm_detector.py), algorithm borrowed from Automated DJ Mixes (attack_onsets + lattice_fit), adapted to no numpy/scipy. Our stems are pre-isolated so no Demucs needed. Validating against known-BPM kicks: Ak1ra 122, Coldabank 134, Jones 130, Lucozade 125.
[2026-06-25] Claude - DONE: Built Source/bpm_detector.py (pure stdlib — 1kHz mean-abs envelope -> attack onsets -> median-interval seed -> least-squares lattice fit). Integrated into project_builder.py: bpm arg now optional, auto-detects from kick (fallback drums->bass), explicit bpm overrides; detect_project_bpm() helper added, __main__ accepts 4 or 5 args. VALIDATED: all 4 real kicks exact (Ak1ra 122, Coldabank 134, Jones 130, Lucozade 125), sub-ms fits, py_compile clean, integration test exit 0. Changed: Source/bpm_detector.py (new), Source/project_builder.py, Documentation/AI_CONTEXT.md.
[2026-06-25] Claude - DONE: Two backlog fixes. [2026-06-25] Claude - STARTED: Replacing duplicated-stems flat-reference GroupTrack with a single bounced flat-ref track (red/37, muted, Ext. Out). New Source/bounce.py (pure-stdlib stem summing -> float32 WAV). Supplied ref/riff/master files kept as separate match tracks, never summed. Extracted real external-out XML from Sam's projects (AudioOut/External/S0, Ext. Out, 1/2; Speaker Manual=false; color 37).
[2026-06-25] Claude - DONE: Flat-ref bounce track shipped. bounce.py sums mix stems in 1s lockstep chunks -> 32-bit float WAV (synthetic sum exact; 14 stems @ 2min in ~32s; peak preserved, no clip). als_patcher: added set_track_output_external + set_track_muted, removed GroupTrack insertion for refs. project_builder: REF_TRACK_COLOR=37, prints flat bounce of mix stems as last track, keeps supplied references as match tracks. VALIDATED on real ALS build (Coldabank, has a supplied Ref Bounce): no GroupTrack, FLAT REF last+ext+muted, supplied ref kept ext+muted, working tracks Main+unmuted, all checks exit 0. Retired the 'ref group opens expanded' bug. Changed: Source/bounce.py (new), Source/als_patcher.py, Source/project_builder.py, Documentation/AI_CONTEXT.md.
